summary: Tenant Registration & Google Workspace SSO Testing - ALL MAJOR FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (tenant/list requires auth - expected). Frontend: Registration flow, login, and SSO settings all working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 401 - requires authentication (expected behavior for protected endpoint)

passed_tests: Subdomain availability check - short subdomain rejected (< 3 chars)
Subdomain availability check - reserved subdomains rejected (www, api, admin, etc.)
Subdomain availability check - existing subdomain marked as taken
Subdomain availability check - new unique subdomain marked as available
Tenant registration - success with valid data
Tenant registration - duplicate subdomain rejected (400)
Tenant registration - duplicate email rejected (400)
Tenant registration - invalid email format rejected (422)
Tenant registration - short password rejected (422)
Tenant info - existing tenant info returned correctly
Tenant info - non-existent tenant returns 404
Tenant info - newly registered tenant info accessible
New tenant login - registration + login flow works
New tenant login - wrong password rejected (401)
Existing admin login - successful with correct credentials
Google Workspace config - auth_config structure includes google_workspace_enabled/domain
Google Workspace login - blocked for tenants without config enabled
UI - Registration form loads with all fields visible
UI - Company name auto-generates subdomain on blur
UI - Subdomain availability check shows 'Available' indicator
UI - Registration creates workspace and shows success page
UI - Success page shows tenant URL, next steps, trial end date
UI - Login page shows tenant branding (name, logo, tagline)
UI - Login page shows 'Sign in with Google Workspace' button when SSO enabled
UI - Login page shows domain hint '@testdomain.com accounts'
UI - Login page shows 'Or use password' divider
UI - Login redirects to /home after successful login
UI - Tenant Settings page loads correctly
UI - Settings tab shows Google Workspace SSO section
UI - Google Workspace toggle enables/disables SSO
UI - Domain input field appears when Google Workspace enabled
UI - Save Auth Settings shows success toast
jane@demosaas.com login for demo-saas-incdemosaas tenant - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: tenant_registration.py: Well-structured with proper validation for subdomain format, reserved names, and uniqueness
tenant_registration.py: Admin user correctly created with 'Admin' role and password hashed
tenant_registration.py: Default lead statuses created for new tenants
tenant_registration.py: Google Workspace config pre-filled with admin's email domain
auth.py: google-workspace-login endpoint validates tenant's allowed_domain before login
auth.py: Auto-provisions new users from Google Workspace with 'User' role
models/tenant.py: TenantRegistration validates subdomain format and reserved names
RegisterTenant.js: Shows success page with next steps after registration
Login.js: Fetches tenant info and shows appropriate branding/auth options
Login.js: Shows 'Sign in with Google Workspace' when google_workspace_enabled=true
TenantSettings.js: Settings tab has complete Google Workspace SSO configuration UI
seed_data_creation: Multiple test tenants created during testing (pw-test-*, test-reg-*, test-info-*, test-login-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant registration and Google Workspace SSO features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/tenants/register, GET /api/tenants/check-subdomain/{subdomain}, GET /api/tenants/info/{tenant_id}. Google Workspace SSO enabled for nyla-air-water tenant with allowed_domain='testdomain.com'. Actual Google OAuth callback requires GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID env var - UI/backend logic verified but actual OAuth flow not testable without real Google credentials.
